live_research_budget.fallback_if_budget_exhausted: Use the existing research packet, do not invent missing evidence, and record the gap in adversarial_notes.missing_evidence.

canonical_thread_policy.per_turn_rule: Every HoloBuild turn after turn 1 must receive the full canonical thread so far, including prior prompts, outputs, critiques, governor briefs, live source records, rejected options, and the current candidate artifact.
canonical_thread_policy.overflow_rule: If the full thread cannot fit in context, stop and mark the run blocked instead of dropping or summarizing prior turns.

model_and_convergence_policy.active_rotation: randomized constrained; no consecutive active-model repeats
model_and_convergence_policy.early_convergence_rule: Stop early only if both the active model and Grok 4.3 HoloGov judge that no further meaningful improvement is possible.

run_rule: Generate one schema-compliant JSON artifact for Cosori TurboBlaze Air Fryer only.

universal_strategy.assignment_anchor: Please craft campaign copy that focuses on the product's features and functionalities while highlighting how these innovations contribute to a better, more wellness-forward lifestyle. Each section of copy should creatively position the brand's benefits in a way that resonates with new audiences.
universal_strategy.mandatory_bridge_formula: feature or functionality -> everyday friction removed -> better routine or lifestyle contribution
universal_strategy.per_section_requirement: Every Meta ad, website banner, email body, and P.S. must include or reinforce the bridge from functionality to lifestyle. A section that lists features without explaining the lifestyle payoff is incomplete.
universal_strategy.source_rule: Live research is allowed, but source metadata must be stored for every new factual claim.

product_lanes.primary_strategy: TurboBlaze contributes to a healthier lifestyle by making less-oil home cooking easier to choose repeatedly. The copy should show how speed, 9-in-1 versatility, PFAS-free ceramic coating, dishwasher-safe cleanup, and up to 95% less oil help turn home cooking into a realistic wellness-forward routine.
claim_boundaries: Do not imply disease prevention or medical benefit.
Keep 'up to' on 46% faster and 95% less oil.
Use first-party comparison basis where the format has room.
live_research_targets: current Cosori social or Meta Ad Library examples if available
selected review or retail pages only for customer-language patterns
